title: Debug a request blocked by a VPC Service Controls perimeter
description: Read the unique violation reason from the audit log and adjust ingress/egress rules or access levels rather than removing the perimeter.
body: Use when a call to a GCP API fails with a VPC-SC violation. Do not delete the perimeter to unblock. Actions: read the audit log's uniqueId and violation reason, determine whether it's an ingress or egress boundary crossing, and add a scoped ingress/egress rule or access level for the specific identity, project, and service. Validation signals include the dry-run mode showing the rule would permit the call, then the live call succeeding while other crossings stay blocked. Risk boundary: any change to a VPC-SC perimeter is a security boundary change and is human-gated.
